result.diagnostic_for_dev_team: Cycle 94 R-25 zeta first-test post-DB-registration: PARTIAL with INTERCEPT WORKING + envelope shape needing fix. APF correctly intercepted POST https://api.zeta-ai.io/v1/rooms/{roomId}/messages/stream (200 OK, text/event-stream;charset=UTF-8, 1.0kB body, 8ms -- far smaller than real ~62KB ScatterLab roleplay stream). However: (1) DevTools EventStream parser reads ZERO events from the body -- strong signal SSE framing is malformed (likely missing 'event: \n' or 'data: \n' line prefixes, OR malformed CRLF, OR missing trailing blank-line frame separator). (2) Frontend throws TypeError 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading [0])' -- means even if events were parseable, the JSON shape is missing an array field that the React client indexes via [0]. Most likely candidates: (a) chunkMessage missing required nested array (e.g. text fragments / blocks / parts), (b) replyMessage missing required messageMetadata array, (c) the IN_PROGRESS event sequence preceding CHAT_COMPLETE not actually being emitted -- maybe only CHAT_COMPLETE was sent without any prior IN_PROGRESS chunks. Recommendation: dump the actual 1024-byte envelope bytes via etap.log + diff against the verbatim response body captured in #604 (files/604/api_response_body.txt). Note: error popup is Tailwind utility-class 'fixed inset-0 ... bg-black/50' overlay with [확인] button -- clicking it navigates back to /ko home (lose roomId). Reproducibility confirmed: 2 consecutive sends produced identical TypeError, so the envelope problem is deterministic (not race/timing).
result.next_iteration_recommendation: Build zeta_sse_v2: (1) verify via etap.log bytes that envelope actually contains IN_PROGRESS events (not just CHAT_COMPLETE), (2) ensure correct SSE line format (each event line MUST start with 'data: ' prefix and frames separated by blank line per SSE spec), (3) include all chunkMessage nested fields the client indexes -- diff carefully against #604 verbatim, (4) confirm replyMessage object includes nested arrays where #604 had them (even if empty arrays []), (5) preserve messageId in MESSAGE-{epochMs}-{4char-suffix} format. Re-test once any one of (1)-(4) is corrected.
obstacles_encountered: DevTools Response tab returned 'Failed to load response data -- Request with the provided ID has already finished loading' (couldn't retain raw body for direct inspection)
DevTools EventStream parser shows 0 events for the 1.0kB body -- strong signal SSE framing/format is malformed (no event:/data: lines, or chunk encoding broken)
Clicking 확인 button on error popup navigates user back to /ko home -- required navigating back into the chat room (back button) and re-sending PII prompt to re-capture artifacts

notes: Cycle 94 R-25 zeta first-test post-DB-registration: PARTIAL_intercept_envelope_mismatch. APF intercept working (200 OK, text/event-stream;charset=UTF-8, 1.0kB body in 8ms vs real ~62KB roleplay stream). BUT envelope malformed: (1) DevTools EventStream parses 0 events from body (SSE framing broken -- likely missing 'data: ' prefix or blank-line separator), (2) Frontend throws TypeError 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading [0])' -- missing nested array field that client indexes via [0]. UI shows Tailwind error popup '일시적인 오류가 발생했어요'. 3 Sentry POSTs confirm client-side error. Reproducible on 2 consecutive sends (deterministic, not race). Recommend zeta_sse_v2: verify etap.log bytes vs #604 verbatim, ensure correct SSE line format ('data: ' prefix + blank-line separator), include all chunkMessage/replyMessage nested arrays even if empty []. 5 artifacts in files/605/. Processed via Subagent Dispatch (7m08s, 58 tool uses).
